title: Bobo Lib
description: A library mod for Bobophones mods
body:
# A library mod for Bobophones mods

A small library for Bobophones mods to prevent code duplication and add some useful features as:

- Base classes for items, blocks, and entities
- Different functions for the world
- Different functions for GUI
- Different functions for models
- Different math functions
- A DevTool to which you can add your own function in the code
